project_type: Java console RPG game (MVC architecture, future libGDX integration)
build_system: javac direct compilation, no build tool (no Gradle/Maven). Build command uses -sourcepath src to resolve packages.
test_framework: No formal test framework. Verification is via successful compilation with javac.
build_command: javac -d out -sourcepath src src/model/events/*.java src/model/status/*.java src/model/items/*.java src/model/skills/*.java src/model/enemies/*.java src/model/*.java src/controller/*.java
test_command: No test suite - validation is via compilation success
verification_instructions: 1. Run the build command above (all packages must compile cleanly with zero errors). 2. Ensure no I/O (System.in/out/err, Scanner, PrintWriter) in model or controller packages.
setup_instructions: Java 25 is pre-installed. No setup needed beyond compiling with javac.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No external dependencies allowed - only Java standard library. No build tool - pure javac.
contribution_requirements: Commit to phase2-decouple-logic branch. Maintain zero I/O in model and controller. Use GameEvent system for all communication. Preserve all existing Phase 2 mechanics exactly.
key_patterns: GameEventDispatcher is base class for event-emitting objects. GameEvent uses builder pattern: GameEvent.builder(TYPE).put(key, val).build(). CombatEngine has forwardingListener that pipes child events to central bus. All entities extend GameCharacter extends GameEventDispatcher. Player.executeAction(PlayerAction, target) returns boolean. Defense formula: reduction = defense/100.0, blocked = damage * reduction, finalDamage = damage - blocked. Mana regen is controller responsibility (+10/turn in CombatEngine.processPlayerAction).
directory_structure: src/ has three packages: model/ (game entities, events/ subpackage), controller/ (CombatEngine, GameState FSM, WaveManager, ChestSystem). No view layer yet (future libGDX). Output goes to out/ directory.
